summary: iOS | User can get stuck on Supported Devices screen
scenario: Supported Devices screen becomes unresponsive when closed and reopened within 2 seconds from home screen with no headset connected
description_clean: User can get stuck on the Supported Devices screen if it is closed and reopened within ~2 seconds. This occurs only when accessing the screen from the home screen while no headset is connected. The user should be able to freely navigate through the app.
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the Android device.
3. From the Home screen, tap the 'Supported Devices' option to open the Supported Devices screen.
4. Close the Supported Devices screen (e.g., tap the back button or close icon) to return to the Home screen.
5. Within approximately 2 seconds of closing, tap the 'Supported Devices' option again to reopen the Supported Devices screen.
expected: The Supported Devices screen opens normally, and the user can freely navigate through the app without any issues.
actual: The user gets stuck on the Supported Devices screen and cannot navigate away or interact with the app freely.
